MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Robert A. Imhoff is not present.
Arnold Walter Evje, specially appearing, for the plaintiff.

Defendant Daniel R. Drenger is not present.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The settlement conference is off calendar because the plaintiff and defendant failed to appear. The trial date of September 4, 2007 remains on calendar.
